channel.title: The Cloudflare Blog
channel.description: Get the latest news on how products at Cloudflare are built, technologies used, and join the teams helping to build a better Internet.

item.title: 【500 Tbps of capacity: 16 years of scaling our global network】500 Tbps 容量：16 年扩展我们的全球网络
item.description: 【 Cloudflare’s global network has officially crossed 500 Tbps of external capacity, enough to route more than 20% of the web and absorb the largest DDoS attacks ever recorded. 】Cloudflare 的全球网络外部容量已正式突破 500 Tbps，足以路由超过 20% 的网络并吸收有史以来最大规模的 DDoS 攻击。

item.title: 【From bytecode to bytes: automated magic packet generation】从字节码到字节：自动生成魔包
item.description: 【 By applying symbolic execution and the Z3 theorem prover to BPF bytecode, we’ve automated the generation of malware trigger packets, cutting analysis time from hours to seconds. 】通过将符号执行和 Z3 定理证明器应用于 BPF 字节码，我们自动生成了恶意软件触发数据包，将分析时间从几小时缩短到几秒钟。

item.title: 【Cloudflare targets 2029 for full post-quantum security】Cloudflare 的目标是 2029 年实现全面的后量子安全
item.description: 【 Recent advances in quantum hardware and software have accelerated the timeline on which quantum attack might happen. Cloudflare is responding by moving our target for full post-quantum security to 2029. 】量子硬件和软件的最新进展加快了量子攻击可能发生的时间。 Cloudflare 的回应是将我们的全面后量子安全目标推迟到 2029 年。

item.title: 【How we built Organizations to help enterprises manage Cloudflare at scale】我们如何构建组织来帮助企业大规模管理 Cloudflare
item.description: 【 Cloudflare Organizations is now in public beta, introducing a new management layer for enterprise customers with multiple accounts. Learn how we consolidated our authorization systems to enable org-wide management. 】Cloudflare Organizations 现已推出公开测试版，为拥有多个帐户的企业客户引入了新的管理层。了解我们如何整合授权系统以实现组织范围内的管理。

item.title: 【Why we're rethinking cache for the AI era】为什么我们要重新思考人工智能时代的缓存
item.description: 【 The explosion of AI-bot traffic, representing over 10 billion requests per week, has opened up new challenges and opportunities for cache design. We look at some of the ways AI bot traffic differs from humans, how this impacts CDN cache, and some early ideas for how Cloudflare is designing systems to improve the AI and human experience. 】AI 机器人流量的爆炸式增长（每周超过 100 亿个请求）为缓存设计带来了新的挑战和机遇。我们研究了 AI 机器人流量与人类流量不同的一些方式、这如何影响 CDN 缓存，以及 Cloudflare 如何设计系统来改善 AI 和人类体验的一些早期想法。

item.title: 【Introducing EmDash — the spiritual successor to WordPress that solves plugin security】隆重推出 EmDash — WordPress 的精神继承者，解决插件安全问题
item.description: 【 Today we are launching the beta of EmDash, a full-stack serverless JavaScript CMS built on Astro 6.0. It combines the features of a traditional CMS with modern security, running plugins in sandboxed Worker isolates. 】今天，我们推出 EmDash 测试版，这是一个基于 Astro 6.0 构建的全栈无服务器 JavaScript CMS。它将传统 CMS 的功能与现代安全性相结合，在沙盒 Worker 隔离区中运行插件。

item.title: 【Our ongoing commitment to privacy for the 1.1.1.1 public DNS resolver】我们对 1.1.1.1 公共 DNS 解析器隐私的持续承诺
item.description: 【 Eight years ago, we launched 1.1.1.1 to build a faster, more private Internet. Today, we’re sharing the results of our latest independent examination. The result: our privacy protections are working exactly as promised. 】八年前，我们推出了 1.1.1.1，以构建更快、更私密的互联网。今天，我们将分享最新独立检查的结果。结果：我们的隐私保护完全按照承诺发挥作用。

item.title: 【Introducing Programmable Flow Protection: custom DDoS mitigation logic for Magic Transit customers】推出可编程流量保护：为 Magic Transit 客户定制 DDoS 缓解逻辑
item.description: 【 Magic Transit customers can now program their own DDoS mitigation logic and deploy it across Cloudflare’s global network. This enables precise, stateful mitigation for custom and proprietary UDP protocols. 】Magic Transit 客户现在可以编写自己的 DDoS 缓解逻辑，并将其部署在 Cloudflare 的全球网络中。这可以为自定义和专有 UDP 协议提供精确、有状态的缓解。

item.title: 【Cloudflare Client-Side Security: smarter detection, now open to everyone】Cloudflare 客户端安全：更智能的检测，现已向所有人开放
item.description: 【 We are opening our advanced Client-Side Security tools to all users, featuring a new cascading AI detection system. By combining graph neural networks and LLMs, we've reduced false positives by up to 200x while catching sophisticated zero-day exploits. 】我们向所有用户开放先进的客户端安全工具，其中包括新的级联人工智能检测系统。通过将图神经网络和法学硕士相结合，我们将误报率减少了高达 200 倍，同时捕获了复杂的零日漏洞。

item.title: 【How we use Abstract Syntax Trees (ASTs) to turn Workflows code into visual diagrams 】我们如何使用抽象语法树（AST）将工作流程代码转换为可视化图表
item.description: 【 Workflows are now visualized via step diagrams in the dashboard. Here’s how we translate your TypeScript code into a visual representation of the workflow. 】现在，工作流程通过仪表板中的步骤图进行可视化。以下是我们如何将您的 TypeScript 代码转换为工作流程的可视化表示。
